scope_note: QA Witt Tower Orbit Transition Markov Chain cert [455]. Pre-registered in-sample (IS) Markov matrix from ^GSPC 2001-2012 (n_IS=136 pairs, n_S_IS=5), validated against out-of-sample (OOS) 2013-2026 (n_OOS=163 pairs, n_S_OOS=7). Orbit classes: S=both bins divisible by 9, Sat=exactly one, C=neither (same as certs [453][454]). PRE-REGISTERED IS MATRIX: P(S->S)=0.200, P(S->Sat)=0.800, P(S->C)=0.000; P(Sat->S)=0.167, P(Sat->Sat)=0.333, P(Sat->C)=0.500; P(C->S)=0.000, P(C->Sat)=0.113, P(C->C)=0.887. Key zeros (staircase): P(S->C)=0 and P(C->S)=0. CERTIFIED FACTS: (C1) GSPC IS n_IS=136>=80, n_S_IS=5>=3 PASS. (C2) IS staircase S->C=0, C->S=0 PASS. (C3) OOS staircase: GSPC OOS S->C=0, C->S=0 AND QQQ OOS S->C=0, C->S=0 PASS. (C4) Cosmos persistence hierarchy: P(C->C)_full=0.899>0.80>P(Sat->Sat)_full=0.333 PASS. (C5) S non-persistence: P(S->S)_OOS=0.500<P(C->C)_OOS=0.908 PASS. (C6) Pooled multi-asset OOS staircase: GSPC+QQQ n_S_OOS=7+2=9, S->C=0, C->S=0 across both assets PASS. GSPC OOS S-months: 2013-12, 2016-09, 2020-01, 2020-02, 2020-03 (COVID crash cluster), 2022-05, 2022-06. Theorem NT: log-returns are observer projections; rank bins and orbit class are QA integer state. QA mapping: global rank-normalized monthly log-returns -> Z/27Z bins -> orbit class pairs -> Markov chain. IS/OOS split at 2013-01. PRIMARY SOURCES: Wall HS (1960) doi:10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541; NBER www.nber.org/cycles. Structural parents: cert [110], cert [453], cert [454]. Validated 2026-06-18.
